warehouseQuery.query: SELECT  	   ca.CLAIM_HK AS                                               Claim_Key 	 , lia.Claim_Liability_Personal_Injury_YN 	 , isnull(mot.Claim_Motor_Division_Name, wc.Claim_WC_Division_Name) AS Claim_Division_Name 	 , mot.Claim_Motor_Fault_Code AS                                    Claim_Motor_Fault_Key 	 , mot.Claim_Motor_Vehicle_Class_Code AS                            Claim_Motor_Vehicle_Class_Key 	 , mot.Claim_Motor_Bodily_Injury_YN 	 , mot.Claim_Motor_Vehicle_Loss_Day_of_Week_Code 	 , mot.Claim_Motor_Vehicle_Loss_Time_Number 	 , mot.Claim_Motor_Cost_Centre_Name 	 , mot.Claim_Motor_Driver_Age_Years_Number 	 , mot.Claim_Motor_Vehicle_Finance_YN 	 , mot.Claim_Motor_Vehicle_Rego_Code 	 , mot.Claim_Motor_Vehicle_Total_Loss_YN 	 , mot.Claim_Motor_Vehicle_Description 	 , mot.Claim_Motor_Vehicle_Usage_Code 	 , mot.Claim_Motor_Driver_Licensed_Years_Number 	 , mot.Claim_Motor_Vehicle_Manufactured_Year_Number 	 , mot.Claim_Motor_Driver_Gender_Code 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Worker_Suburb_Name 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Worker_State_Code 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Worker_Postcode 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Gender_Code 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Birth_Date_Key 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Marital_Status_Code 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Full_Time_Part_Time_Code 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Hourly_Rate_First_13_Weeks_Amount 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Hourly_Rate_Thereafter_Amount 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Worker_Weekly_Hours_Rate 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Worker_Weekly_Hours_Time 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Occupation_Name 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Classification_Code 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Body_Location_Code AS                               Claim_WC_Body_Location_Key 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Agency_of_Accident_Code AS                          Claim_WC_Agency_of_Accident_Key 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Breakdown_Agency_Code AS                            Claim_WC_Breakdown_Agency_Key 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Ceased_Work_Date_Key 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Common_Law_Raised_Date_Key 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Common_Law_Outcome_Code 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Common_Law_Severity_Code 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Medical_Certificate_Last_Date_Key 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Loss_Day_of_Week_Code 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Estimated_Return_Date_Key 	 , wc.Claim_WC_IMA_Date_Key 	 , wc.Claim_WC_IMA_Reviewed_YN 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Injury_Mechanism_Code AS                            Claim_WC_Injury_Mechanism_Key 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Injury_Nature_Code AS                               Claim_WC_Injury_Nature_Key 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Fitness_Level_Code 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Lost_Hours_Number 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Lost_Minutes_Number 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Injury_Most_Serious_Description 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Injury_Object_Involved_Name 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Work_Resumed_Date_Key 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Loss_Time_Number 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Department_Name 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Worker_Name 	 , wc.Claim_WC_ASCO_Code AS                                        ASCO_Key 	 , wc.Industry_Class_ANZSIC_2006_Code AS                        Industry_Class_ANZSIC_2006_Key 	 , lia.Claim_Liability_Law_Costs_YN 	 , lia.Claim_Liability_Other_Damages_YN 	 , lia.Claim_Liability_Cause_Code 	 , lia.Claim_Liability_Severity_Code 	 , lia.Claim_Liability_Litigation_Status_Code 	 , lia.Claim_Liability_Property_Damage_YN 	 , lia.Claim_Liability_Financial_Loss_YN 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Received_Date_by_Employer /*BI-1517*/ 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Work_Status /*BI-1517*/ 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Worker_RTW_Program 	 , wc.Claim_WC_Worker_RTW_Goals 	 , wc.DUTY_STATUS_WM /*GBR-1201*/ as                            Claim_Duty_Status    FROM  	   BDV.V_S_CLAIM AS ca 	   LEFT JOIN 		  BDV.V_S_CLAIM_MOTOR AS mot 	   ON mot.CLAIM_HK = ca.CLAIM_HK 	   LEFT JOIN 		   BDV.V_S_CLAIM_WC AS wc 	   ON wc.CLAIM_HK = ca.CLAIM_HK 	   LEFT JOIN 		   BDV.V_S_CLAIM_LIABILITY AS lia 	   ON lia.CLAIM_HK = ca.CLAIM_HK order by 1
SELECT CLAIM_HK AS Claim_Key, Claimant_Name, Claim_Motor_Driver_Name, Claim_Motor_Driver_Names_Text FROM BDV.V_S_CLAIMANT ORDER BY Claim_Key

SELECT    ca.CLAIM_HK AS Claim_Key,    ca.Claim_Number,    ca.Claim_Cause_of_Loss_Description,    ca.Claim_Postcode,    ca.Claim_UX_Type_Code,    ca.Claim_UX_Arrangement_Description,    ca.Claim_Salvage_YN,    ca.Claim_Recovery_YN,    ca.Company_Code AS Company_Key,    ca.Claim_Branch_Code AS Claim_Branch_Key,    ca.Premium_Class_Code AS Premium_Class_Key,    ca.Product_Code AS Product_Key,    glob.Global_LoB_Code AS Global_LoB_Key,    ca.Claim_Reported_Date_Key,    ca.Claim_Expiry_Date_Key,    ca.Claim_Loss_Date_Key,    ca.Claim_Indemnity_Decision_Code AS Claim_Indemnity_Decision_Key,    ca.Claim_Indemnity_Decision_Date_Key,    ca.Claim_Status_Date_Key,    ca.Claim_Solicitor_Code AS Claim_Solicitor_Key,    ca.Claim_Assessor_Code AS Claim_Assessor_Key,    ca.Claim_Investigator_Code AS Claim_Investigator_Key,    ica.Catastrophe_Event_ICA_Code AS Catastrophe_Event_ICA_Key,    ca.Claim_Handler_Code AS Claim_Handler_Key,    pol.POLICY_HK AS Policy_Key,    ca.Claim_Portfolio_Code AS Claim_Portfolio_Key,    rsk.Risk_Id AS Risk_Key,    ca.Claim_Reopened_YN,    ca.Claim_Notified_Date_Key,    lreg.Location_State_Code AS Claim_State_Code,    cty.Claim_Type_Code AS Claim_Type_Key,    ca.Claim_Status_Code AS Claim_Status_Key,    ca.Risk_Class_Code AS Risk_Class_Key,    pol.PARTY_BROKER_HK AS Broker_Account_Key,    pol.PARTY_CLIENT_HK AS Client_Key,    ca.Policy_Incep_Date_Key,    ca.Policy_Period_Name,    ca.Claim_Closed_Date_Key,    ca.Claim_Non_Standard_Type_Code AS Claim_Non_Standard_Type_Key,    trn.Claim_Transaction_Date_Key AS Claim_Reopened_Last_Date_Key,    ca.Claim_Date_Accepted_Key,    ca.Claim_Date_Rejected_Key,    wcanz.Industry_Class_ANZSIC_93_Code AS Industry_Class_ANZSIC_93_Key,    ca.Claim_Liability_Status_Code,    ca.Claim_Liability_Date_Key,    ca.Claim_Agg_Arrangement_Type_Key,    ca.Claim_Agg_Arrangement_Key,    lreg.REF_HK AS Claim_Loss_Location_Key,    ca.Claim_BGC_Status_Code,    cld.Claim_Loss_Date_Difference_Days_Number,    cld.Claim_Loss_Date_Modified_Date_Key,    clds.EXT_SANC_SANC_KEY AS Claim_Loss_Date_Modified_User_Key,    cld.Claim_Loss_Date_Modified_YN,    cld.Claim_Loss_Orig_Date_Key,    rar.Claim_Recovery_Abandonment_Reason_Code AS Claim_Recovery_Abandonment_Reason_Key,    rar.Claim_Recovery_Changed_YN,    rar.Claim_Recovery_Changed_Date_Key,    ca.Claim_Updated_Datetime,    ca.Claim_Updated_Date_Key,    ca.Claim_Updated_User_Code AS Claim_Updated_User_Key,    ca.Claim_Duplicate_Status_Code AS Claim_Duplicate_Status_Key,    ca.Claim_Fraud_Type_Code AS Claim_Fraud_Type_Key,    cldt.Claim_Duplicate_Loss_Date_Tolerance_Number AS Claim_Duplicate_Loss_Days_Tolerance_Key,    cldt.Claim_Duplicate_Loss_Days_Number AS Claim_Duplicate_Loss_Days_Number,    cldt.Claim_Duplicate_Potential_YN AS Claim_Duplicate_Potential_YN,    cldt.Claim_Duplicate_Potential_Key,    ca.Claim_Gross_Incurred_Loss_Type_Code AS Claim_Gross_Incurred_Loss_Type_Key,    ca.Client_Claim_Number,    ca.Claim_Vulnerable_Flag,   ca.Claim_Time_Occurence,    ca.Claim_Cyclone_Flag,    ca.ARPC_Incident_Number    FROM    BDV.V_S_CLAIM AS ca    LEFT JOIN RDV.V_L_POL_CLAIM_POLICY_CLIENT_BROKER AS pol ON pol.CLAIM_HK = ca.CLAIM_HK    LEFT JOIN BDV.V_L_CLAIM_RISK AS rsk ON rsk.CLAIM_HK = ca.CLAIM_HK    LEFT JOIN BDV.V_L_CLAIM_REGION AS lreg ON ca.CLAIM_HK = lreg.CLAIM_HK    LEFT JOIN BDV.V_S_CLAIM_REOPENED AS trn ON trn.CLAIM_HK = ca.CLAIM_HK    LEFT JOIN BDV.V_L_CLAIM_WC_ANZSIC_93 AS wcanz ON wcanz.CLAIM_HK = ca.CLAIM_HK    LEFT JOIN BDV.V_L_CLAIM_GLOBAL_LOB AS glob ON glob.CLAIM_HK = ca.CLAIM_HK    LEFT JOIN BDV.V_L_CLAIM_TYPE AS cty ON cty.CLAIM_HK = ca.CLAIM_HK    LEFT JOIN BDV.V_L_CLAIM_CATASTROPHE_EVENT_ICA AS ica ON ica.CLAIM_HK = ca.CLAIM_HK    LEFT JOIN BDV.V_S_CLAIM_LOSS_DATE AS cld ON cld.CLAIM_HK = ca.CLAIM_HK    LEFT JOIN RDV.V_S_POL_SANC AS clds ON clds.EXT_SANC_SANC_KEY = cld.Claim_Loss_Date_Modified_User_Code    LEFT JOIN BDV.V_S_CLAIM_RECOVERY_ABANDONMENT_REASON AS rar ON rar.CLAIM_HK = ca.CLAIM_HK    LEFT JOIN BDV.V_S_CLAIM_DUPLICATE_LOSS_DAYS AS cldt ON cldt.CLAIM_HK = ca.CLAIM_HK  order by    1
